meta.title: Apollo 8 Christmas Eve Kerbal recreation and 50k subscribers celebration!
meta.description:
It's the 49th anniversary of the first time humans left Earth's orbit and orbited another celestial body, one of my favorite missions, Apollo 8! We're going to build a Saturn V in Kerbal Space Program and recreate one of the coolest Apollo missions!

Show your support and join our discord channel by becoming Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Music by Everyday Astronaut - http://soundcloud.com/everydayastronaut

Everyday Astronaut hats, prints, shirts and more at - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

SpaceX models by Oli Braun http://twitter.com/oli_braun
